prompt: I've been working on a bunch of stuff today. Can you look at my changes and help me commit them? I've got changes in the auth module (new token refresh logic + tests), some test fixes for the payment module, and I updated the README with new setup instructions. Everything is unstaged.

assertions.text: Agent runs git status and git diff before proposing any commits
Agent groups auth feature code and its tests together in one feat: commit (not splitting tests into a separate test: commit)
Agent separates the README change into a docs: commit
Agent presents the grouping plan and asks for user confirmation before executing any git commands
All commit messages follow conventional commit format: type(scope): description
